title: Top Free Productivity Tools for Indian Professionals 2026
summary: The best free productivity tools that Indian IT, finance, HR, and sales professionals actually use daily — no subscriptions.
content:
# Top Free Productivity Tools for Indian Professionals 2026

## Finance & Accounting Professionals

**Income Tax Calculator:** Compare old and new regime, calculate TDS. Updated for FY 2025–26. [Use it](/tools/income-tax-calculator.html)

**GST Calculator:** All slabs (5%, 12%, 18%, 28%) with CGST/SGST/IGST breakdown, reverse calculation. [Use it](/tools/gst-calculator.html)

**EMI Calculator:** Full amortization schedules for client presentations. [Use it](/tools/emi-calculator.html)

## IT & Tech Professionals

**JSON Formatter:** Daily tool for API debugging — paste messy responses, get clean readable JSON. [Use it](/tools/json-formatter.html)

**Base64 Encoder:** JWTs, API authentication, data URIs — in-browser, safe for sensitive tokens. [Use it](/tools/base64-encoder.html)

**Password Generator:** Cryptographically random passwords for system accounts. [Use it](/tools/password-generator.html)

**AI App Generator:** Quick internal tools, expense trackers, calculators — describe and get working code. [Try it](/)

## HR & Payroll Professionals

**Salary Calculator:** Verify take-home pay from CTC. [Use it](/tools/salary-calculator.html)

**Gratuity Calculator:** Exact gratuity per Payment of Gratuity Act. [Use it](/tools/gratuity-calculator.html)

## Sales & Marketing

**WhatsApp Link Generator:** Click-to-chat links with pre-filled messages for sales follow-ups. [Use it](/tools/whatsapp-link.html)

**QR Code Generator:** QR for visiting cards, product packaging, exhibition stalls. [Use it](/tools/qr-generator.html)

## The ROI Reality

Professionals without these tools spend 2–3 hours daily on tasks these handle in minutes. At ₹500–2,000/hour opportunity cost, that's ₹2.5–15 lakh annually — far more than any subscription. These tools are free.
